title: El barchante Neguib
writer: Carlos Orellana, Ramiro Gómez Kemp, Joaquín Pardavé
actors: Joaquín Pardavé, Sara García, Jorge Ancira
plot: Lebanese Neguib travels to the capital to see his son Alfredo, who does not give him accommodation in the apartment he shares with Cuban Alejandro. Neguib, his wife Sara, their daughters Natalia and Rebeca, and their brother-in-la...
